ApiKeyManager.noKeysHint: Store profiles for quick switching between TorBox accounts.

emptyState.description: Set up an automation rule to archive downloads automatically. When a download gets archived, you'll find it here to restore, copy, or delete.
emptyState.noSearchResults: No archived downloads match your search.
emptyState.step1: Add a rule with "Archive Download" action
emptyState.step2: When the rule triggers, matching downloads are archived
emptyState.step3: They show up here so you can restore, copy, or delete
emptyState.title: No Archived Downloads

actions.addAirlockDescription: Lock the download in TorBox Airlock
actions.addTagDescription: Add one or more tags to the download
actions.archiveDescription: Move the download to archived downloads without deleting files
actions.deleteDescription: Permanently delete the download and its files
actions.removeAirlockDescription: Unlock the download from TorBox Airlock
actions.removeTagDescription: Remove one or more tags from the download
actions.stopSeedingDescription: Stop seeding the torrent but keep it in the download list

assetTypes.hint: Conditions and actions are limited to what every selected type supports.
assetTypes.label: Type

conditions.ageDescription: Time since the download was added (in hours)
conditions.allowZipDescription: Whether the torrent allows ZIP file extraction
conditions.availabilityDescription: Ratio of available pieces to total pieces (0.0-1.0)
conditions.avgDownloadSpeedDescription: Average download speed in MB/s over the hours you specify
conditions.avgUploadSpeedDescription: Average upload speed in MB/s over the hours you specify
conditions.cachedDescription: Whether the torrent is cached on the server
conditions.downloadStalledTimeDescription: Time since download activity stopped (in minutes)
conditions.etaDescription: Estimated time until download completion (in minutes)
conditions.expiresAtDescription: Hours remaining until the torrent expires; the value you enter is compared in hours
conditions.fileCountDescription: Number of files in the torrent
conditions.fileSizeDescription: Total size of all files in the torrent (in GB)
conditions.isActiveDescription: Whether the torrent is currently active (downloading or seeding)
conditions.isAirlockedDescription: Whether the download is locked in TorBox Airlock
conditions.lastDownloadActivityDescription: Minutes since last download activity; the value you enter is compared in minutes
conditions.lastUploadActivityDescription: Minutes since last upload activity; the value you enter is compared in minutes
conditions.longTermSeedingDescription: Whether the torrent has been seeding for an extended period
conditions.name: Name
conditions.originalUrlDescription: Original URL that was used to create the download (supports text search)
conditions.privateDescription: Whether the torrent is from a private tracker
conditions.seedingEnabledDescription: Whether seeding is enabled for this torrent
conditions.seedingRatioDescription: Ratio of uploaded data to downloaded data
conditions.statusDescription: Current status of the torrent (downloading, seeding, completed, etc.)
conditions.totalUploadedDescription: Total amount of data uploaded (in GB)
conditions.trackerDescription: Tracker URL or name (supports text search)
conditions.uploadStalledTimeDescription: Time since upload activity stopped (in minutes)

emptyState.backendRequiredDescription: Connect the TorBox Manager backend so rules are saved and evaluated automatically. Without it, rules cannot run in the background.
emptyState.description: Create rules to automatically stop seeding, archive, delete, tag, or force-start downloads when conditions match.
emptyState.step1: Define conditions (ratio, status, tags, and more) and choose an action
emptyState.step2: With the backend connected, rules run on a schedule around the clock
emptyState.step3: View execution logs or run a rule manually from its card
emptyState.title: No automation rules yet

AutomationRules.noConditionsInGroup: No conditions in this group. Click '+ Condition' to add one.

operators.gte: is greater than or equal to
operators.lte: is less than or equal to

AutomationRules.ruleEvaluatedNoActions: Rule was evaluated but no actions were performed.
AutomationRules.title: Automation Rules

CustomViews.noFilters: No filters. Click '+ Filter' in a group to create one.
CustomViews.noFiltersInGroup: No filters in this group. Click '+ Filter' to add one.

CustomViews.viewEditorDescriptionCreate: Name your view and set filters to quickly switch download lists.
CustomViews.viewEditorDescriptionEdit: Update filters and optionally include sort, columns, or search with this view.
CustomViews.viewEditorDescriptionFilter: Build filters to apply to your list, or save them as a reusable view.

toast.retrySourceUnavailable: Cannot retry: source link is not available

errors.accessDenied: Access denied. Please check your API key and account status.
errors.activeLimit: You have reached your maximum active downloads limit. Please wait for some to complete.
errors.authFailed: Authentication failed. Please check your API key.
errors.downloadTooLarge: The download is too large for your current plan. Please upgrade your account.
errors.invalidNzb: The provided NZB file or link is invalid. Please check the file and try again.
errors.monthlyLimit: You have reached your monthly download limit. Please upgrade your account.
errors.networkError: Unable to connect to TorBox servers. Please check your internet connection and try again.
errors.serverOverloaded: TorBox servers are temporarily overloaded. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.serverTimeout: TorBox servers are taking too long to respond. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.serverUnavailable: TorBox servers are temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.temporaryIssue: This is likely a temporary issue with TorBox servers. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests to TorBox servers. Please wait a moment and try again.

help.checkApiKey: Check that your API key is correct and has sufficient permissions
help.downloadSlots: Ensure your account has available download slots
help.serverErrors: If you see server errors, wait a few minutes and try again
help.uploadLimit: Upload no more than 10 NZB files at once to avoid server errors
help.validLinks: Make sure your NZB links are valid and accessible

apply.alreadyHasReferrer: Your account already has a referral code.
apply.confirmBody: This attaches the TorBox Manager referral code to your TorBox account before you subscribe.

apply.confirmBullet2: You get 7 extra days per month purchased (e.g. 12 months = 84 days).

apply.success: Referral code applied to your TorBox account.

callout.compactMessage: Bonus days on your first subscription — apply our referral code, then subscribe on TorBox.
callout.rssHint: Upgrade to Pro on TorBox and get bonus days on your first subscription with our referral.
callout.slimMessage: Get 7 extra days per month on your first TorBox subscription when you use our referral before you pay.

disclaimer.firstPurchase: Referral bonus applies to your first paid purchase only.
disclaimer.giftCards: Gift cards and vouchers do not qualify.

panel.heroSubtitle: 7 bonus days for each month you purchase (you and the referrer).

SearchBar.placeholderSearch: Search by title or IMDB ID (e.g. imdb:tt0133093)...
SearchBar.searchDownloadsHelpAnd: Plus — matches only when every word appears (e.g. matrix+1999)
SearchBar.searchDownloadsHelpCombine: Combine terms — all parts must match (e.g. "The Matrix" 1080p -sample)
SearchBar.searchDownloadsHelpExclude: Minus — hides matches containing that text (e.g. -sample)
SearchBar.searchDownloadsHelpIntro: Matches download titles and file names.
SearchBar.searchDownloadsHelpOr: Several words — matches if any word appears (e.g. 1080p bluray)
SearchBar.torrentSearchWarning: TorBox torrent search is currently unreliable and may return incomplete or incorrect results. Usenet search is recommended when available.

SearchResults.noResultsHint: Try a different query, enable custom engines, or switch search type.
